scripts.verify:deployment-security: node --test scripts/deployment-security.test.mjs scripts/smoke-selfhosted.test.mjs && pnpm --filter site-astro exec vitest run tests/pages-deployment-static.test.ts
scripts.verify:admin: pnpm --filter admin test && pnpm --filter admin typecheck && pnpm --filter admin build && pnpm --filter admin verify:dist-network
scripts.verify:site: pnpm build:admin && pnpm --filter site-astro typecheck && pnpm --filter site-astro test:with-build && pnpm --filter site-astro test:perf-network
scripts.verify:all: pnpm verify:secrets && pnpm verify:deployment-security && pnpm verify:worker && pnpm verify:shared && pnpm verify:admin && pnpm verify:site
